item.title: Fineotex Chemical Ltd Falls 7.04%: 4 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Fineotex Chemical Ltd experienced a challenging week from 2 to 6 March 2026, closing at Rs.21.93, down 7.04% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.23.59. This decline notably outpaced the Sensex’s 3.00% fall over the same period, reflecting intensified selling pressure amid bearish technical signals and cautious market sentiment. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Sri Adhikari Brothers Television Network Ltd Falls 9.94%: 4 Key Events Shaping the Week
item.description: Sri Adhikari Brothers Television Network Ltd (SABTN) endured a turbulent week from 2 to 6 March 2026, with its share price declining sharply by 9.94% to close at Rs.108.40, significantly underperforming the Sensex’s 3.00% fall. The stock experienced two lower circuit hits and two upper circuit triggers amid heavy selling and buying pressures, reflecting heightened volatility and mixed investor sentiment in a challenging market environment. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Lancor Holdings Ltd’s Volatile Week: -0.62% Amid Circuit Hits and Market Swings
item.description: Lancor Holdings Ltd experienced a turbulent week from 2 to 6 March 2026, closing marginally lower by 0.62% at Rs.23.90 despite significant intraday volatility marked by both lower and upper circuit hits. The stock notably outperformed the Sensex, which declined 3.00% over the same period, reflecting a mixed sentiment amid heavy selling pressure early in the week and a sharp rebound midweek driven by strong buying interest. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Jindal Saw Ltd Falls 9.89%: 2 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Jindal Saw Ltd experienced a challenging week from 2 to 6 March 2026, with its share price declining by 9.89% to close at Rs.166.65, significantly underperforming the Sensex which fell 3.00% over the same period. The week was marked by a sharp gap down opening on Monday amid market concerns and a continuation of bearish technical momentum by Friday, reflecting persistent selling pressure and volatile market conditions. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Evexia Lifecare Ltd Declines 0.67% Amidst Valuation Reset and Market Pressure
item.description: Evexia Lifecare Ltd’s stock closed the week marginally lower by 0.67% at Rs.1.49, underperforming the broader Sensex which declined 3.00%. The week was marked by the stock hitting a fresh 52-week low and a notable shift in valuation metrics from expensive to fair, reflecting ongoing challenges in profitability and market sentiment. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Edelweiss Financial Services Ltd Falls 4.41%: Downgrade and Technical Shifts Shape the Week
item.description: Edelweiss Financial Services Ltd closed the week ending 6 March 2026 at Rs.109.45, down 4.41% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.114.50. This underperformance slightly exceeded the Sensex’s 3.00% decline over the same period, reflecting a week marked by a downgrade in rating, technical momentum shifts, and a significant gap down in price amid market concerns. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: ICICI Bank Ltd. Declines 4.76% Amid High Trading Volumes and Mixed Derivatives Activity
item.description: ICICI Bank Ltd. closed the week ending 6 March 2026 at Rs.1,313.35, down 4.76% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.1,379.00. This decline outpaced the Sensex’s 3.00% fall over the same period, reflecting a challenging week marked by sustained selling pressure, technical weakness, and mixed investor sentiment despite robust trading volumes and active derivatives positioning. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Swan Defence Surges 16.85% Amid Four-Day Rally and Upper Circuit Hits
item.description: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Ltd delivered a remarkable weekly performance, surging 16.85% from ₹1,723.90 to ₹2,014.35 between 2 and 6 March 2026. This rally significantly outpaced the Sensex, which declined 3.00% over the same period, underscoring the stock’s strong relative strength amid a broadly weak market. The week was marked by multiple upper circuit hits, fresh 52-week highs, and a complex technical momentum landscape that investors should carefully analyse. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Automobile Corporation Of Goa Ltd Gains 0.93%: 3 Key Technical and Fundamental Factors Driving the Week
item.description: Automobile Corporation Of Goa Ltd closed the week with a modest gain of 0.93%, ending at Rs.1,686.00 on 6 March 2026, outperforming the Sensex which declined 3.00% over the same period. The stock experienced a volatile week marked by an upgrade in analyst rating, shifts in technical momentum, and mixed price movements amid broader market weakness. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Lumax Auto Technologies Declines 12.93%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Slide
item.description: Lumax Auto Technologies Ltd experienced a challenging week from 2 to 6 March 2026, with its share price declining by 12.93% to close at Rs.1,530.95, significantly underperforming the Sensex which fell 3.00% over the same period. The stock faced sharp downward pressure amid sectoral weakness, technical momentum shifts, and heightened volatility, culminating in a week marked by notable intraday lows and cautious investor sentiment. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: TajGVK Hotels & Resorts Ltd Falls 7.34%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: TajGVK Hotels & Resorts Ltd experienced a challenging week from 2 to 6 March 2026, with its stock price declining by 7.34% to close at Rs.330.80, underperforming the Sensex which fell 3.00% over the same period. The week was marked by fresh 52-week lows, significant gap downs, and persistent downward pressure despite intermittent positive market movements, reflecting ongoing concerns about the company’s financial performance and market sentiment. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: One Global Service Provider Ltd Falls 13.21%: 2 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: One Global Service Provider Ltd experienced a challenging week on the BSE, closing at Rs.572.20 on 6 March 2026, down 13.21% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.659.30. This decline notably outpaced the Sensex’s 3.00% drop over the same period, reflecting a combination of a rating downgrade and a shift in technical momentum that weighed heavily on investor sentiment. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Kavveri Defence Gains 1.04%: 2 Key Events Shaping the Week
item.description: Kavveri Defence & Wireless Technologies Ltd experienced a volatile week from 2 to 6 March 2026, closing with a modest gain of 1.04% to Rs.65.03, outperforming the Sensex which declined 3.00% over the same period. The stock’s price action was marked by a sharp lower circuit hit on 2 March amid heavy selling pressure, followed by a strong recovery capped by an upper circuit on 6 March, reflecting a week of intense investor sentiment swings. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Orient Cement Ltd. Falls 5.78%: 4 Key Factors Behind the Steep Decline
item.description: Orient Cement Ltd. endured a challenging week from 2 to 6 March 2026, with its share price declining 5.78% to close at Rs.145.15, underperforming the Sensex which fell 3.00% over the same period. The stock hit fresh 52-week lows amid weak technical momentum, a downgrade to a Sell rating, and subdued long-term growth prospects, despite recent strong profit growth and a solid debt position. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Vinyl Chemicals Declines 1.36% Despite Valuation Shift: 3 Key Factors Driving the Week
item.description: Vinyl Chemicals (I) Ltd’s stock closed the week at Rs.207.40, down 1.36% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.210.25, while the Sensex fell 3.00% over the same period. Despite the stock’s modest decline, it outperformed the benchmark index, which suffered a sharper drop. The week was marked by fresh 52-week lows, valuation shifts, and mixed market signals that influenced price movements and investor sentiment. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Eicher Motors Ltd Falls 4.95%: 4 Key Factors Shaping This Week’s Volatility
item.description: Eicher Motors Ltd closed the week ending 6 March 2026 at Rs.7,618.65, down 4.95% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.8,015.70. This decline outpaced the Sensex’s 3.00% fall over the same period, reflecting a week marked by significant technical volatility and sectoral pressures. Despite the negative weekly return, the stock’s underlying medium- to long-term technical indicators and upgraded Mojo Grade continue to signal resilience amid a challenging market backdrop. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Heritage Foods Declines 3.61%: 2 Key Factors Behind the Weekly Slide
item.description: Heritage Foods Ltd experienced a challenging week from 2 to 6 March 2026, with its share price declining by 3.61% to close at Rs.307.00, underperforming the Sensex which fell 3.00% over the same period. The stock continued its downward trajectory, hitting a fresh 52-week low early in the week and showing signs of sustained bearish momentum amid weak financial results and technical pressures. Time: 3 hours ago
